reviews.comment:
Hay veces que no tiene combustible y perjudica a los que viajan larga distancia. La atención de los muchachos muy bien y los precios muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
Sometimes they run out of fuel, which is a problem for long-distance travelers. The service from the guys was great, and the prices were very reasonable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobW9YTEZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Qué suerte que están allí!!!!

(Translated by Google)
How lucky you are that they are there!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobkpxVnhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La demora es terrible y poco personal ,sumada la demora de la frontera ,es de terror ,encima que uno viene conduciendo por una ruta nada fácil ,te complican las vacaciones ,deberían tener más empatía con los viajeros !!

(Translated by Google)
The delays are terrible and there's hardly any staff. Add to that the border delays, and it's a nightmare. On top of driving along a difficult route, they ruin your vacation. They should have more empathy for travelers!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNU5TRnNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bueno y ideal para cargar combustible para los viajeros que pasan viaje a Chile, con servicio publico y confitería excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Good and ideal for refueling for travelers passing through on their way to Chile, with excellent public service and confectionery.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNob0x1UnlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bonito sitio pero nunca tiene gasolina  😕

(Translated by Google)
Nice place but they never have gas 😕

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I enjoyed visiting this place, which, despite its altitude of almost 5,000 meters, is located next to the border between Argentina and Chile.

(Original)
Gostei de conhescer apesar das altitudes de quase 5 mil metros este lugar fica ao.lado da Duana fronteira de Argentina com Chile.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) 40-minute wait in line to refuel the motorcycle and unfriendly staff.

(Original)
40 min de fila para abastecer a moto e funcionários pouco simpáticos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeGVlWEF3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) A mandatory stop for refueling. Gas is more expensive, but we have to take into account that we're in the middle of the desert. The convenience store is weak.

(Original)
Parada obrigatória para abastecimento. Gasolina mais cara mas temos que levar em conta estar no meio do deserto. Loja de conveniência fraca.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdVl5QjR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Be careful, don't rely on this gas station for fuel; it's always out of stock.

(Original)
Cuidado, não dependa de gasolina neste posto, está sempre em falta.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCa1puMDFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tenían combustible ... la atención del full un desastre ... el pibe un desagradable

(Translated by Google)
They didn't have fuel... the service from the driver was a disaster... the guy was unpleasant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCZ2NuY0dREAE

reviews.comment:
Medio floja esta full respecto a otras. Hay poca variedad de todo. Los baños están bien, permanecen limpios. La atención regular y no anda el wifi.

(Translated by Google)
This place is a bit underwhelming compared to others. There's not much variety in everything. The bathrooms are fine and stay clean. The service is just okay, and the Wi-Fi doesn't work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcnZ2Y0lBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muchas demora para atender ,los camiones hacen lo que quieren no dan lugar a los automóviles  en especial los Paraguayos

(Translated by Google)
There are long delays in service; trucks do whatever they want and don't give way to cars, especially Paraguayan ones.
